**What does this change and why?**

**Checklist**
- [ ] Tests added/updated (mock CLIs only; nothing calls real providers)
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` and `uv run ruff check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run pyright` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally
- [ ] No document text in argv, logs, or committed files
- [ ] No authorship-claim language anywhere (see README framing)
- [ ] Non-obvious decisions recorded in DECISIONS.md
